0.text: Pleural effusion with a thickness of 0.5 cm in the right lung

1.text: Centrally located centriacinar nodules in both lungs

2.text: Ground glass opacities in both lungs, predominantly in the lower lobes

3.text: Slight increase in thickness of the major fissure on the right

4.text: Linear fibrotic atelectatic areas in the lower lobes of both lungs
